channel.title: Made You A Mixtape
channel.description: One song per episode – deep dives into the history, production, and stories behind the music that shaped us.
channel.itunes:author: Alex Rivera
channel.itunes:summary: One song per episode – deep dives into the history, production, and stories behind the music that shaped us.

item.title: God Only Knows – The Beach Boys
item.description: Brian Wilson called it his finest work. Paul McCartney said it's the greatest song ever written. We unpack the layered harmonies, the Wrecking Crew's session, and Carl Wilson's unforgettable vocal take.
